description_long: This kettle features a unique, modern design with a prominent, curved spout extending from a smooth, metallic body. The main vessel is suspended within a circular frame supported by three copper-colored, arched legs, giving it an elevated and sculptural appearance. The body of the kettle is a glossy, light gray material, while the legs have a textured, rust-like finish. The top of the kettle is covered by a circular, dark lid with a small knob, and the spout is integrated seamlessly into the upper body. The lower portion of the vessel appears to be a translucent olive-green, suggesting a glass or plastic chamber for holding liquid. The overall construction combines both functional and decorative elements, making it a striking object for urban environments.
description: A modern kettle with a curved spout, suspended vessel, and copper-colored arched legs, featuring a glossy gray body and translucent olive-green lower chamber.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved spout, circular lid, and all three copper-colored legs supporting the suspended vessel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched leg profile and the translucent olive-green chamber beneath the kettle body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the spout pointing left, showing the back of the vessel and the symmetry of the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the arched legs and the suspended design of the kettle.
